minor.message: Add a brief comment on why the integration flag is cleared before the proxy vars (prevents future reordering).
Test (3) sentinel/undefined check could assert absence of specific keys for resilience.
AQ2 afterEach does not restore _ucvgSeams.inferenceProxyFactory despite the comment; harmless (per-file worker) but the comment is wrong.
Success-path test does not assert INFERENCE_PROXY_* removed from process.env after the finally cleanup.

suggestion.message: Add a defense-in-depth test asserting validateSandboxEnv does NOT throw on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (documents the opt-out invariant).

minor.message: Misleading catch comment (claimed FakeModelClient fallback while code hard-exited) — RESOLVED in 67ddfb3e1: catch now clears the integration flag so the fallback actually happens, comment corrected.

suggestion.message: For the AISDLC-521 strict in-container follow-up, bind the proxy to the docker bridge IP rather than 0.0.0.0; containment currently relies on the 64-hex session token + --network policy (acceptable for opt-c host-side).
